new_nodes.content: OpenClaw框架下，SKILL.md必须放在openclaw_skills/<skill名>/目录下，与TOOLS.md和scripts/同级
data/knowledge目录保持原位不移动，作为领域知识层；整体采用四层物理布局：组织契约层(aos/)、智能体能力层(openclaw_skills/)、领域知识层(data/knowledge/)、架构文档层(docs/)
quant_assistant已有脚本：order_execute.py, strategy_builder.py, strategy_deploy.py，与strategy-researcher可能存在能力重叠

用户需要提供5项信息：1)aos/org/agents/_charter-template.md全文；2)aos/org/agents/agent-duty-reporter.md全文；3)aos/runtime/tickets/_protocol.md和_template.md全文；4)openclaw_skills/duty-reporter/SKILL.md和TOOLS.md全文；5)关于quant_assistant的关系选择（A/B/C）或提供其SKILL.md/TOOLS.md/scripts
strategy-researcher的scripts/应包括research_loop.py, hypothesis_gen.py, backtest_runner.py, result_analyzer.py, archive_writer.py

superseded_nodes.reason: 原有的AOS-native目录结构被新的四层物理布局替代：SKILL.md位置从projects/abu_modern/aos/agents/strategy-researcher/改为openclaw_skills/strategy-researcher/，且取消了prompts/子目录嵌入SKILL.md的做法
